definitions.usage_example: Many countries, for instance, Spain, have siestas.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE for instance AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Many countries, for instance, Spain, have siestas.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado como sinónimo de 'for example'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a synonym for 'for example'.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Tal como / Tales como]
definitions.usage_example: I like citrus fruits, such as oranges.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE such as AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I like citrus fruits, such as oranges.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para introducir uno o más ejemplos que pertenecen a una categoría.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to introduce one or more examples that belong to a category.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Al final / A fin de cuentas]
definitions.usage_example: We worked hard, and in the end, we succeeded.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE in the end AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: We worked hard, and in the end, we succeeded.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para indicar un resultado final o conclusión después de un largo proceso.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to indicate a final result or conclusion after a long process.

definitions.usage_example: To sum up, it was a great trip.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE to sum up AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: To sum up, it was a great trip.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para introducir un breve resumen de los puntos principales.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to introduce a brief summary of the main points.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: En resumen / En pocas palabras]
definitions.usage_example: The meeting was long and boring. In short, a waste of time.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE in short AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The meeting was long and boring. In short, a waste of time.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para resumir una situación brevemente.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to summarize a situation briefly.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: En general / Con todo]
definitions.usage_example: All in all, it was a good day.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE all in all AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: All in all, it was a good day.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para dar una conclusión, considerando todos los aspectos.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to provide a conclusion, considering all aspects.

definitions.usage_example: Overall, the project was a success.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Overall, the project was a success.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Teniendo todo en cuenta; en general.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Taking everything into account; in general.

definitions.usage_example: In conclusion, the results support our theory.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE in conclusion AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In conclusion, the results support our theory.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para señalar el final o resumen de un discurso o texto.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to signal the end or summary of a speech or text.
